channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Sweden is investigating a damaged cable in the Baltic Sea
item.description: STOCKHOLM (AP) — Swedish authorities said on Friday they were investigating a damaged cable that was discovered in the Baltic Sea, the latest in a string of recent incidents of ruptured undersea cables that have heightened fears of Russian sabotage and spying in the region.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: US Marshals Service deputizes Musk's security team: reports
item.description: The U.S. Marshals Service has deputized some of tech billionaire Elon Musk's private security detail, giving them specific rights and protections of federal law enforcement agents, multiple outlets reported Friday.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Apple drops encryption feature for UK users after government reportedly demanded backdoor access
item.description: Apple says it will stop offering an advanced data security option for British users after the government reportedly demanded that the company provide backdoor access for any data those users have stored in the cloud.
item.dc:creator: Kelvin Chan, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Meze Audio's beautiful new wired headphones have a new kind of planar magnetic driver, hand-finished in Ukraine
item.description: These new premium headphones from Meze Audio go big on planar magnetic drivers, with a suitably big price.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Apple terminates UK data protection after government overreach
item.description: As of 10 a.m. (ET) today, Apple is no longer offering new users in the UK the chance to enable Advanced Data Protection. Essentially, anyone who now wants to enable the feature to protect their data against criminal or state surveillance or exfiltration will no longer be able to do so.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Q&A: East Bay AI safety expert talks about the future of the technology
item.description: Artificial intelligence safety expert and Redwood Research CEO Buck Shlegeris explains the different philosophies guiding A.I. advancement.
item.dc:creator: Chase Hunter, The Mercury News

item.title: Mom of Starliner astronaut says daughter 'honored' to be on ISS
item.description: Williams was one of two people testing the Starliner capsule, which was not deemed safe for crewed return.
item.dc:creator: Steph Whiteside, The Hill

item.title: Everything new on Max in March 2024
item.description: Here's the full list of everything new on Max in March 2025 – including new movie releases Sing Sing and Heretic.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: Leaked Nothing Phone 3a and 3a Pro renders tease a mid-range phone that should have Samsung worried
item.description: Thanks to a leaked render, we could have our first proper look at the Nothing Phone 3a and 3a Pro – and even by looks alone, they seem to be worthy challengers for Samsung’s mid-range Galaxy handsets.
item.dc:creator: jamie.richards@futurenet.com (Jamie Richards), TechRadar

item.title: Nvidia's RTX 5000 GPUs continue to face severe supply issues, with RTX 5070 Ti reportedly being even worse for launch stock than the RTX 5080
item.description: Nvidia's RTX 5000 GPU launch is getting worse every day, it seems, as new reports indicate the RTX 5070 Ti is facing dire supply shortages.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves could be 2025's best fighting game, and you can try it right now
item.description: The Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves Open Beta is live now, here's everything you need to start playing.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Perplexity releases a censorship-free variant of Deepseek R1
item.description: Perplexity is releasing its model R1 1776, a version of Deepseek R1 with open model weights that has been post-trained to remove China’s censorship and provide more unbiased, accurate answers, according to Perplexity co-founder and CEO Aravind Srinivas. He wrote about the move on LinkedIn.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: OSINT's Evolving Role in National Security: A Critical Tool Against Hybrid Threats
item.description: Join us for a discussion on OSINT's integration with other intelligence disciplines, public-private collaboration, and the steps needed to professionalize the field.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Bannon: ‘Oligarchs’ will abandon Republicans
item.description: Steve Bannon argued that the “oligarchs” close to President Trump will abandon Republicans the same way they did to Democrats. Bannon was briefly interviewed by CNN’s Donie O’Sullivan on Wednesday, when he continued his case against tech billionaires Elon Musk and Mark Zuckerberg.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: Defense tech company True Anomaly expands into California
item.description: True Anomaly, a defense technology company, announced its expansion into Southern California with a 90,000-square-foot factory in Long Beach.
item.dc:creator: Christina Merino, The Mercury News

item.title: Ex-OpenAI CTO Mira Murati launches AI startup, recruits top talent from rivals
item.description: Former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati has launched an AI startup, Thinking Machines Lab, escalating the fight for top talent and reshaping competition in the fast-evolving sector.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Playing by the rules of AI
item.description: The Fast Company Impact Council is a private membership community of influential leaders, experts, executives, and entrepreneurs who share their insights with our audience. Members pay annual membership dues for access to peer learning and thought leadership opportunities, events and more.
item.dc:creator: Juan Orlandini, Fast Company

item.title: Lead CMMC architect returns to Pentagon as DoD CISO
item.description: Katie Arrington's return to DoD comes as her lawyers work out a settlement with the government related to the suspension of her security clearance in 2021. The post Lead CMMC architect returns to Pentagon as DoD CISO first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Apple's iPhone 16e: A $599 Package of Innovation and Value
item.description: Apple's new iPhone 16e combines three innovations in one package, including the A18 chip, Apple Intelligence, and the C1 modem, all for a price of $599. The device confirms all pre-launch speculation and offers a range of features, making it a superb mid-range smartphone.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Oracle extends support for on-prem Oracle Database 19c
item.description: As the status of an on-premises version of Oracle Database 23ai remains in limbo, the company has tossed a bone to its on-prem Oracle Database 19c customers in the form of an extension of Premier Support to Dec. 31, 2029, and Extended Support to Dec. 31, 2032.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: iPhones may soon be able to use satellite connections indoors
item.description: Sending messages via satellite on iPhones should soon be as easy to as using your mobile network signal, as Apple and satellite partner Globalstar put a new satellite constellation into space.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Dell secures deal worth more than $5B in Elon Musk's xAI startup company
item.description: Elon Musk's xAI is one step closer to becoming a reality after Dell secured a deal worth more than $5 billion.
item.dc:creator: Erica Pauda, NewsNation
